text.title: PHPUnit Testing Patterns Examples
text.summary: Worked example: OrderServiceTest with factory + DataProvider + constructor mocks.

example.context: Laravel 11 + PHPUnit 11; OrderService::calculateTotal($items) returns Money; needs to test multiple edge cases (empty, single, discount, currency mix).
example.walk: Step 1: tests/Unit/Services/OrderServiceTest.php extends TestCase. Step 2: factory builds OrderItem stubs. Step 3: AAA — arrange Money objects + DiscountService mock, act calculateTotal, assert Money equals expected. Step 4: #[DataProvider('totalCases')] returns array of [items, expectedCents]; one test_calculates_total method covers all 8 cases. Step 5: --order-by=random green 3 times.
example.output: OrderServiceTest runs in 80ms (no Laravel boot); failures pinpoint the offending data row; suite scales linearly with cases.
